sql_query.query: WITH seeded_org AS (INSERT INTO organizations (id, name, slug, currency, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (1, 'Build Africa', 'build-africa-demo', 'NGN', TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, slug = EXCLUDED.slug, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, active = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id), seeded_users AS (INSERT INTO users (id, organization_id, name, email, password, role, avatar_url, paystack_recipient_code, active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT v.id, o.id, v.name, v.email, $1, v.role, NULL, v.recipient_code, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM seeded_org o CROSS JOIN (VALUES (101, 'Amara Okafor', 'amara@demo.milestonerail.app', 'learner', $2), (102, 'David Mensah', 'david@demo.milestonerail.app', 'mentor', NULL), (103, 'Fatima Bello', 'fatima@demo.milestonerail.app', 'finance', NULL), (104, 'Nia Adeyemi', 'nia@demo.milestonerail.app', 'admin', NULL), (111, 'Kwame Boateng', 'kwame@demo.milestonerail.app', 'learner', $2), (112, 'Zainab Diallo', 'zainab@demo.milestonerail.app', 'learner', $2)) v(id, name, email, role, recipient_code) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, name = EXCLUDED.name, email = EXCLUDED.email, password = EXCLUDED.password, role = EXCLUDED.role, paystack_recipient_code = EXCLUDED.paystack_recipient_code, active = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id, organization_id), seeded_cohort AS (INSERT INTO cohorts (id, organization_id, name, program_name, location, start_date, end_date, currency, budget, committed, disbursed, learner_count, active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 201, o.id, 'Build Africa · Cohort 07', 'Digital Product Fellowship', 'Lagos · Accra · Remote', '2026-06-01T00:00:00Z'::timestamptz, '2026-09-30T23:59:59Z'::timestamptz, 'NGN', 7500000, 5175000, 3840000, 64, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM seeded_org o ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, name = EXCLUDED.name, program_name = EXCLUDED.program_name, location = EXCLUDED.location, start_date = EXCLUDED.start_date, end_date = EXCLUDED.end_date, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, budget = EXCLUDED.budget, committed = EXCLUDED.committed, disbursed = EXCLUDED.disbursed, learner_count = EXCLUDED.learner_count, active = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id, organization_id), seeded_milestones AS (INSERT INTO milestones (id, organization_id, cohort_id, title, description, due_at, amount, evidence_hint, position, active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT v.id, c.organization_id, c.id, v.title, v.description, v.due_at::timestamptz, v.amount, v.evidence_hint, v.position, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM seeded_cohort c CROSS JOIN (VALUES (301, 'Portfolio case study', 'Publish a user-centered case study with research, decisions, and outcomes.', '2026-07-12T17:00:00Z', 30000, 'A public portfolio URL or PDF', 1), (302, 'API capstone', 'Ship a working API-backed product and document one production workflow.', '2026-07-24T17:00:00Z', 45000, 'Repository URL, deployment URL, or product screenshot', 2), (303, 'Demo day pitch', 'Present the product problem, live workflow, evidence, and next milestone.', '2026-08-14T17:00:00Z', 25000, 'Pitch deck or recorded presentation', 3)) v(id, title, description, due_at, amount, evidence_hint, position) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, cohort_id = EXCLUDED.cohort_id, title = EXCLUDED.title, description = EXCLUDED.description, due_at = EXCLUDED.due_at, amount = EXCLUDED.amount, evidence_hint = EXCLUDED.evidence_hint, position = EXCLUDED.position, active = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id, organization_id, cohort_id), seeded_steps AS (INSERT INTO workflow_steps (id, organization_id, cohort_id, label, description, step_type, role, position, sla_hours, active, created_at, updated_at) SELECT v.id, c.organization_id, c.id, v.label, v.description, v.step_type, v.role, v.position, v.sla_hours, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM seeded_cohort c CROSS JOIN (VALUES (501, 'Evidence submitted', 'Learner uploads a link or file and a short context note.', 'evidence', 'learner', 1, NULL), (502, 'Mentor review', 'A mentor checks the work against the milestone rubric.', 'approval', 'mentor', 2, 24), (503, 'Finance approval', 'Finance confirms eligibility, budget, and payout details.', 'approval', 'finance', 3, 8), (504, 'Test payout', 'Sub0 queues a Paystack test transfer and awaits its signed webhook.', 'payout', 'system', 4, 1), (505, 'Receipt issued', 'The learner and program team receive a shared audit record.', 'receipt', 'system', 5, NULL)) v(id, label, description, step_type, role, position, sla_hours) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, cohort_id = EXCLUDED.cohort_id, label = EXCLUDED.label, description = EXCLUDED.description, step_type = EXCLUDED.step_type, role = EXCLUDED.role, position = EXCLUDED.position, sla_hours = EXCLUDED.sla_hours, active = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id, organization_id, cohort_id), seeded_submissions AS (INSERT INTO submissions (id, organization_id, milestone_id, learner_id, evidence_url, evidence_storage_key, evidence_file_name, evidence_note, status, current_step_id, submitted_at, reviewer_feedback, created_at, updated_at) SELECT v.id, m.organization_id, v.milestone_id, v.learner_id, v.evidence_url, NULL, v.evidence_file_name, v.evidence_note, v.status, v.current_step_id, v.submitted_at::timestamptz, v.reviewer_feedback, COALESCE(v.submitted_at::timestamptz, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), v.updated_at::timestamptz FROM (VALUES (401, 301, 101, 'https://example.com/amara-portfolio', 'amara-case-study.pdf', 'Research synthesis, prototype decisions, and usability outcomes are included.', 'paid', 505, '2026-07-10T09:12:00Z', 'Clear problem framing and strong evidence behind each design decision.', '2026-07-11T14:42:00Z'), (402, 302, 101, NULL, NULL, '', 'draft', 501, NULL, NULL, '2026-07-21T12:00:00Z'), (403, 302, 111, 'https://example.com/kwame-capstone', 'capstone-architecture.png', 'Live deployment, API collection, and architecture notes are linked.', 'submitted', 502, '2026-07-20T08:30:00Z', NULL, '2026-07-20T08:30:00Z'), (404, 302, 112, 'https://example.com/zainab-capstone', 'demo-walkthrough.mp4', 'The video shows onboarding, the primary workflow, and failure recovery.', 'awaiting_finance', 503, '2026-07-19T13:15:00Z', 'Meets the rubric. Error handling is especially well demonstrated.', '2026-07-20T10:20:00Z')) v(id, milestone_id, learner_id, evidence_url, evidence_file_name, evidence_note, status, current_step_id, submitted_at, reviewer_feedback, updated_at) JOIN seeded_milestones m ON m.id = v.milestone_id JOIN seeded_users u ON u.id = v.learner_id AND u.organization_id = m.organization_id JOIN seeded_steps ws ON ws.id = v.current_step_id AND ws.organization_id = m.organization_id ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, milestone_id = EXCLUDED.milestone_id, learner_id = EXCLUDED.learner_id, evidence_url = EXCLUDED.evidence_url, evidence_storage_key = EXCLUDED.evidence_storage_key, evidence_file_name = EXCLUDED.evidence_file_name, evidence_note = EXCLUDED.evidence_note, status = EXCLUDED.status, current_step_id = EXCLUDED.current_step_id, submitted_at = EXCLUDED.submitted_at, reviewer_feedback = EXCLUDED.reviewer_feedback, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at RETURNING id, organization_id, milestone_id, learner_id), seeded_payouts AS (INSERT INTO payouts (id, organization_id, submission_id, learner_id, amount, currency, provider, provider_reference, provider_event_id, status, failure_message, approved_at, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 601, s.organization_id, s.id, s.learner_id, 30000, 'NGN', 'paystack-test', 'msr_demo_paid_401', 'demo-event-401', 'paid', NULL, '2026-07-11T14:40:00Z'::timestamptz, '2026-07-11T14:42:00Z'::timestamptz, '2026-07-11T14:40:00Z'::timestamptz, '2026-07-11T14:42:00Z'::timestamptz FROM seeded_submissions s WHERE s.id = 401 ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, submission_id = EXCLUDED.submission_id, learner_id = EXCLUDED.learner_id, amount = EXCLUDED.amount, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, provider = EXCLUDED.provider, provider_reference = EXCLUDED.provider_reference, provider_event_id = EXCLUDED.provider_event_id, status = EXCLUDED.status, failure_message = EXCLUDED.failure_message, approved_at = EXCLUDED.approved_at, paid_at = EXCLUDED.paid_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at RETURNING id, organization_id, submission_id), seeded_audits AS (INSERT INTO audit_events (id, organization_id, submission_id, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, event_type, event_key, title, detail, metadata, created_at) SELECT v.id, s.organization_id, s.id, v.actor_id, v.actor_name, v.actor_role, v.event_type, v.event_key, v.title, v.detail, v.metadata::jsonb, v.created_at::timestamptz FROM (VALUES (701, 401, 101, 'Amara Okafor', 'learner', 'evidence_submitted', 'demo:evidence:401', 'Evidence submitted', 'Portfolio case study and supporting file were submitted for review.', NULL, '2026-07-10T09:12:00Z'), (702, 401, 102, 'David Mensah', 'mentor', 'mentor_approved', 'demo:mentor:401', 'Milestone approved', 'The evidence met the portfolio milestone rubric.', NULL, '2026-07-10T16:05:00Z'), (703, 401, 103, 'Fatima Bello', 'finance', 'finance_approved', 'demo:finance:401', 'Stipend authorized', 'Budget and learner eligibility checks passed.', NULL, '2026-07-11T14:40:00Z'), (704, 401, NULL, 'Paystack test', 'provider', 'payout_paid', 'demo:paid:401', 'Test payout confirmed', 'Signed webhook confirmed NGN 30,000 as paid.', '{"providerReference":"msr_demo_paid_401","status":"paid"}', '2026-07-11T14:42:00Z'), (705, 403, 111, 'Kwame Boateng', 'learner', 'evidence_submitted', 'demo:evidence:403', 'Evidence submitted', 'API capstone evidence is ready for mentor review.', NULL, '2026-07-20T08:30:00Z'), (706, 404, 102, 'David Mensah', 'mentor', 'mentor_approved', 'demo:mentor:404', 'Milestone approved', 'Zainab’s API capstone advanced to finance.', NULL, '2026-07-20T10:20:00Z')) v(id, submission_id, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, event_type, event_key, title, detail, metadata, created_at) JOIN seeded_submissions s ON s.id = v.submission_id LEFT JOIN seeded_users actor ON actor.id = v.actor_id AND actor.organization_id = s.organization_id WHERE v.actor_id IS NULL OR actor.id IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id) SELECT o.id AS "organizationId", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_users) AS "userCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_cohort) AS "cohortCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_milestones) AS "milestoneCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_steps) AS "workflowStepCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_submissions) AS "submissionCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_payouts) AS "payoutCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeded_audits) AS "newAuditEventCount" FROM seeded_org o
